bottom_line: Scope lint commands to changed files in code-review prompts to eliminate ruff/Jinja2 false positives that pollute every review step; S03's one self-corrected test failure is a minor one-off.
coverage_notes: Read S01-S04 logs in full. S05 log is 128KB; read tail (last 200 lines after step-done) and grepped for Error/failed patterns. DB telemetry: full (DB:UP).

findings.title: Ruff false-positives on Jinja2 templates pollute `make lint` in every code-review step
findings.recommendation: In code-review prompt templates (S02, S04, S05), instruct agents to scope lint/format to only the item's allowed-path files, using `uv run ruff check <file1> <file2>` rather than `make lint` which runs ruff across all worktrees and produces false-positive Jinja2 parser errors.
evidence: I-00065_S02_run1.log:69 — 'invalid-syntax: Simple statements must be separated by newlines or semicolons' on panel.html:61
I-00065_S05_run1.log:69-200 — ~100 lines of ruff invalid-syntax errors on panel.html
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Scope lint commands to item-allowed-path files in code-review prompts to eliminate ruff/Jinja2 false positives; analyzed in I-00065 (see ai-dev/active/I-00065/reports/I-00065_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/CodeReview_prompt_template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S03 test-impl wrote a multiline-CSS regex that failed on first run; self-corrected
findings.recommendation: Add an example of string-containment CSS selector checking to the tests-impl prompt template, and advise agents to use `id_ in style_block` rather than multiline regex for CSS checks. Also add `--no-cov` to the pytest invocation in the prompt so coverage thresholds don't add noise for small test-file additions.
evidence: I-00065_S03_run1.log:253 — assertion error: all 6 IDs 'missing' from regex matches
I-00065_S03_run1.log:438 — 'The secondary regression test has a regex issue — the selectors span multiple lines'
I-00065_S03_run1.log:456-483 — agent rewrites test using string containment instead of multiline regex
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add CSS multiline-string-check example to tests-impl prompt template to prevent regex-based test failures on multiline CSS selectors; analyzed in I-00065 (see ai-dev/active/I-00065/reports/I-00065_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/Tests_prompt_template.md. Effort: S.
